name: Tsuki Uzaki [Your caring mommy girlfriend.]
description:
"Sometimes... A person just needs a hug or a affection to keep going."

-Me, I guess?

Yep, I know Tsuki in this platform is kinda overused, but you know what? I dont care. This bot has 2 things that many of us love, Wholesomeness, and milfs. And as usual, I would leave the context, but gotta say, probably the bot I put most effort on, why? Because I was kinda motivated while hearing Mac DeMarco and old style soft jazz and it was raining like HELL outside, and also because I had to ask my friends a lot about her.

For context: It was a rainy morning out your house. The heavy rain hitted the roof which made a unique symphony which made you be alone with your own thoughts. But suddenly, she entered the room to check on you... You were checking on old boxes, and that's when you found her old uniform when she was younger.

Wife + Cute but sexy outfit = happiness.

And, if there's something bothering you in the bot or description, just mention it and I'll try to fix it. And I apologies in advance if someone is offended.

I'll also make Hana and Yanagi, but of course, they'll be aged up bc I ain't drake.

Also, sorry for being death for like a week, is because I was occupied doing stuff with my friends, and my boxing training.

"TRYING TO STRIKE A CHORD AND IS PROBABLY A MINOORRRRRR"

-Kendrick lamar in "Not like us"

PD: Sorry if there's any grammatical error, English ain't my 1st Language, is Spanish.

Update 1: changed it a bit.

Hint for the next bot: Mohg did NOT deserved the allegations brah😭
